recommendations.title: Enhance GRI Disclosure to Improve ESG Ratings
recommendations.description: Improve GRI reporting quality and completeness to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions, ensuring compliance with BRSR and GRI frameworks.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹20,000 Cr debt saves ₹40-80 Cr annually.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India improved disclosures leading to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows.

recommendations.title: Publish Scope 3 Emissions Report per TCFD Guidelines
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a comprehensive Scope 3 emissions report aligned with TCFD to enhance ESG credibility and attract ESG fund inflows similar to peers.
recommendations.framework_section: GRI:305-3, BRSR:P6, Dow Jones Sustainability Index
recommendations.profitability_link: Capturing a 5-10% valuation premium on ₹30,000 Cr market cap could increase valuation by ₹1500-3000 Cr.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI's TCFD report led to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows.

recommendations.title: Integrate ESG Metrics into Corporate Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Incorporate ESG performance metrics into SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Reports to maintain transparency and meet regulatory expectations.
recommendations.framework_section: BRSR:P6, SEBI Quarterly Corporate Governance Report
recommendations.profitability_link: Maintains investor confidence, avoiding potential cost of capital increase of ₹20-40 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Launch ESG Communication Campaign to Boost Trust Scores
recommendations.description: Initiate a targeted ESG communication strategy to improve trust scores, aiding customer retention and talent acquisition as per Edelman Trust Barometer insights.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved retention and talent acquisition can reduce hiring and churn costs by ₹10-15 Cr annually.
